summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 2 Spec Integration items. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Governance Health page shows all 7 criteria including new 'Transaction Classification' and 'Separation Alert Health'. Calendar shows auto-created 'Transaction Review' monthly task. Alert History dialog shows 'Minutes' button on resolved alerts for generating resolution minutes.

issues: Header shows '5-Criteria Assessment' but page displays 7 criteria - text should be updated to '7-Criteria Assessment'
Console warning: HTML hydration error - <tr> cannot be child of <span> - appears to be from dev tooling wrapper (x-ve-dynamic), not affecting functionality

action_items: Minor: Update Governance Health page header from '5-Criteria Assessment' to '7-Criteria Assessment'

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Phase 2 integration features working correctly

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test data from previous iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Spec Integration fully tested. (1) Governance Health Score now has 7 criteria: Quarterly Minutes (15pts), Task Compliance (15pts), Compensation Alignment (15pts), Distribution Documentation (15pts), Annual Review (10pts), Transaction Classification (15pts), Separation Alert Health (15pts). Total still 100pts. (2) transaction_review task type auto-created monthly when health score is calculated for trusts with transactions. Task appears in Calendar with description 'Monthly Transaction Classification Review'. (3) POST /api/alerts/{id}/generate-resolution creates general minutes documenting alert resolution. Frontend shows 'Minutes' button in Alert History dialog for resolved alerts.

GET /api/governance/{trust_id} returns 7.details: Health score now includes Transaction Classification and Separation Alert Health criteria

Transaction Classification criterion sco.details: Awards 15pts for >=90%, 10pts for 70-89%, 5pts for 50-69%, 0pts below 50% classified

Separation Alert Health criterion scorin.details: 15pts if no alerts, reduced by yellow/red alerts. 0pts if any red alerts

transaction_review task auto-created.details: Task created when health score calculated for trusts with transactions

transaction_review task in Calendar.details: Task visible in Calendar with due date at end of month

POST /api/alerts/{id}/generate-resolutio.details: Generates general minutes documenting alert resolution

Generated minutes contain alert details.details: Minutes include alert title, description, resolution type, and trustee note

Frontend: Governance Health shows 7 crit.details: All 7 criteria displayed with points and descriptions

Frontend: Calendar shows transaction_rev.details: Transaction Review task visible with description and due date

Frontend: Alert History has Minutes butt.details: Resolved alerts show Minutes button to generate resolution minutes
